description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a striking orange exterior. The car features aggressive front headlights, a sculpted hood, and prominent air intakes, giving it a sporty and high-performance appearance. The side view reveals sharp character lines, large black alloy wheels, and a streamlined roof that tapers smoothly towards the rear. The rear of the car is equipped with dual exhausts, a black rear diffuser, and slim taillights, emphasizing its dynamic design. The windows are tinted and the roof is black, contrasting with the vibrant body color. The car sits on a metallic, industrial platform with hazard markings, suggesting a display or garage setting.
description: A modern, orange coupe car with a low, aerodynamic body, black roof, and sporty detailing, including large wheels and aggressive lighting.
description_view_0: Rear view showing dual exhausts, slim taillights, and a black rear diffuser.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sharp character lines, large black wheels, and sculpted door panels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying aggressive headlights, a sculpted hood, and prominent air intakes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the streamlined profile and sporty side features.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
